Previous page Kills ants and their nests Designed so ants take the granules back to their nest and the entire colony can be destroyed. Attractive to ants The dust-free granules have been formulated with a sugar-based carrier that is attractive to ants. Certified for use in organic systems AntClear uses active ingredients derived from nature and is certified for use in organic systems. Next page 1 Kills Ants & Their Nests 2 Attractive To Ants 3 For Organic Systems Kills ants and their nests AntClear Ant Control Granules Ultra kills ants and their nests and forms a long-lasting barrier for up to 1 month. Its ready to use, dust-free granules are made with a sugar-based carrier which attracts ants – simply apply directly on ants, their walking paths and shelter areas. AntClear Ant Control Granules Ultra is also OF&G certified. The composite box is made from 70% recycled paper. Why should I use AntClear Ant Control Granules Ultra? Ant Control Granules Ultra is an ant control product for amateur use against ants. The active ingredients are derived from plant origin. Dust free with a sugar based carrier that attracts ants. Where can I use AntClear Ant Control Granules Ultra? For outdoor use only. For use on paths, patios and uncultivated land immediately around properties. When should I use AntClear Ant Control Granules Ultra? AntClear Ant Control Granules Ultra can be used at any time of the year, when ant activity is discovered. How do I use AntClear Ant Control Granules Ultra? By drench: dilute 20g in 1 litre of water and apply solution in 1m². By scatter: apply 20g per m². Look for ant runs to help find and estimate the size of the nest. Adapt quantity of the product accordingly. In general, a nest covers 1m².
